usage: getSpecialNetResis [-help] [-net {netName +}] [-outfile <fileName>] [-temperature <temperature>] [-view <viewName>] [-worst  | -p2p <x1 y1 layerName1 x2 y2 layerName2]

options.name: -net
options.description: specify PG/Special net name in {} to calculate

options.name: -p2p
options.description: specify two points to get worst between them

options.name: -worst
options.description: to get the worst net resistance on the net
